libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No extra environment variables or system properties are indicated. Use in-process embedded Jetty/WebAppContext tests with temporary webapp directories and loopback connectors. If reusing the existing WebAppClassLoader.Context helper, adapt it to 9.4.0.RC1: isSystemClass/isServerClass take Class<?> rather than String, and the interface adds isServerResource(String, URL) and isSystemResource(String, URL).

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8856 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-webapp:9.4.0.RC1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: JSP/JMX-specific scenarios may require optional components, but they are not necessary for core jetty-webapp coverage and are not concrete setup requirements for this issue.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jetty-webapp 9.4.0.RC1 brings its normal Jetty servlet/webapp stack transitively and meaningful coverage is reachable with embedded WebAppContext/classloader tests; the observed javac failure is an API signature change in WebAppClassLoader.Context, not missing setup.
